title: firstrun.restart
description: Restart the first-run wizard from Settings. Clears FirstRunState.completedAt and returns existing RegisteredSource rows as prefilledSources so the wizard working buffer can be hydrated (A7, R-E5). Does NOT delete existing RegisteredSource rows. Tauri command: firstrun.restart. Requires confirm: true parameter.

confirm.description: Must be true. Requires explicit caller intent to prevent accidental restarts.

restartedAt.description: Server-local time the restart was processed.

prefilledSources.description: Existing RegisteredSource rows to prefill into the wizard working buffer.

errors.description: Error codes returned as Err(String) via Tauri's Result pattern.

wizard.not_completed.description: Wizard is not in a completed state and cannot be restarted.
